subject: WM-0126 ready for review
body: Delivered M8 readiness matrix and roadmap updates; preserved Web demo-only and Windows controlled external test verdicts; quality, ci:local, m5-invariants, and 100000-tick M5 headless passed; bench failed twice with blocking regressions in entity-store, m4-core-vertical-slice-long-run, map-dirty, and spatial-index, so M8 remains a performance stop-sign candidate.
